summary: Complete testing of Team Invitation System. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend AcceptInvitePage fully tested - all states (loading, error, form, success) working correctly. Complete flow verified: Admin sends invite → Token verified → User accepts with password → New user can login with correct role.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/invitations/send - Admin sends invitation (200)
Backend: POST /api/invitations/send - Invalid role rejected (400)
Backend: POST /api/invitations/send - All valid roles work (spravce, edukator, lektor, pokladni)
Backend: GET /api/invitations/pending - Lists pending invitations (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/invitations/{id} - Cancels invitation (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/invitations/{id} - 404 for non-existent invitation
Backend: GET /api/invitations/verify/{token} - Returns invitation details (200)
Backend: GET /api/invitations/verify/{token} - 404 for invalid token
Backend: POST /api/invitations/accept - Creates user account (200)
Backend: POST /api/invitations/accept - 400 for already used token
Backend: POST /api/invitations/accept - 404 for invalid token
Backend: Auth required for send/pending/cancel endpoints (401/403)
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Error state for missing token
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Error state for invalid token
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Error state for already used token
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Form displays with valid token
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Shows institution name and role
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Name, password, confirm password inputs present
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Short password validation works
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Password mismatch validation works
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Success state after acceptance
Frontend: AcceptInvitePage - Login button redirects to /login
Integration: New user can login after accepting invitation
Integration: New user has correct role (lektor) assigned
critical_code_review_comments: All invitation endpoints properly implement authentication where required
Public endpoints (verify, accept) correctly work without auth
Password validation (min 8 chars) implemented on both frontend and backend
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for testing
Error messages are in Czech as expected
Role display names properly translated (lektor → Externí lektor)
seed_data_creation: Test users and invitations created during testing were cleaned up. One existing pending invitation remains: new-member@example.com (role: lektor).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Invitation System fully tested. All APIs working: POST /api/invitations/send (admin only), GET /api/invitations/pending (admin only), DELETE /api/invitations/{id} (admin only), GET /api/invitations/verify/{token} (public), POST /api/invitations/accept (public). Frontend AcceptInvitePage at /accept-invite?token=xxx handles all states correctly. Valid roles: spravce, edukator, lektor, pokladni, admin, staff, viewer. Invitation expires in 48 hours. Password minimum 8 characters.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/invitations/send: PASS - Creates invitation, sends email (Admin only)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/invitations/pending: PASS - Lists pending invitations for institution

frontend_components.accept_invite_page_error_used_token: PASS - Shows 'Tato pozvánka již byla použita'
frontend_components.accept_invite_page_form: PASS - Shows form with name, password, confirm password
frontend_components.accept_invite_page_validation: PASS - Validates password length and match
frontend_components.accept_invite_page_success: PASS - Shows 'Vítejte v týmu!' with login button
frontend_components.data_testid_attributes: PASS - All interactive elements have data-testid
